body.thing: the inference cutover's anti-confabulation invariant: a coding request resolves to a TOOL-CAPABLE model, so a coding failure halts instead of silently claiming success
body.intention: I intend that after the router cutover a coding request resolves to a model whose structured features include 'tools' (the purpose-built agentic coder), that any model whose catalog tags record 'tool-call' has that capability mirrored into the features flag the selector actually filters on, that the monolith's triples/route()/ModelSpec.source_name are gone, that the triple-only owned-local Hex edges survive into the connections stack the resolver reads, and that every default model remains reachable

red_run.summary:
engine, models = _hermetic_engine()
    
        # ── (B) Recorded capability must be mirrored into the flag the SELECTOR reads.
        # The free-text tags were the evidence; `features` is what routing actually filters on.
        # Leaving them out of sync is what let a tool-less model take the coding slot.
        for spec in models.all():
            if "tool-call" in (spec.tags or []):

                    f"capability makes the model invisible to a tools-requiring policy"
                )

tests/inference/test_consumers_cutover.py:76: AssertionError
=========================== short test summary info ============================
FAILED tests/inference/test_consumers_cutover.py::test_consumers_cutover_proof
1 failed in 0.19s

body.why: The monolith's triples hand-curated devstral as the coding floor. Dimensional selection reads the structured features flag instead, and devstral's was never populated despite its own row recording agentic/tool-call tags — so coding resolved to a tool-less reasoning model that cannot emit a tool call and confabulated completion (claimed it wrote the file; wrote nothing). A builder that confabulates success is worse than one that fails, so the invariant is tool-capability, not model preference. The prior proof asserted through a live InferenceDevice whose HealthMonitor probes real providers, so it passed on environment luck and hid this; the rewritten node is hermetic.
